name: Netherlands
contextBlurb: The Netherlands' housing portfolio is led by Elanor Boekholt-O'Sullivan (D66), Minister for Public Housing and Spatial Planning. The Wet betaalbare huur (Affordable Rent Act), in force since 1 July 2024, extends rent-price protection into the middle segment via the woningwaarderingsstelsel (housing valuation system).

legislation.title: Wet betaalbare huur (Affordable Rent Act)
legislation.summary: The Affordable Rent Act regulates rents for self-contained and non-self-contained dwellings scoring up to 143 points on the woningwaarderingsstelsel. Applies to new rental contracts from 1 July 2024 and, under certain conditions, to existing rental contracts.

keyFigures.name: Elanor Boekholt-O'Sullivan
keyFigures.role: Minister for Public Housing and Spatial Planning
